channel.title: Go Humble! RSS GAMES
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Best of Humble Bundle: Avatar Legends 20th Anniversary Physical RPG Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Experience a cultural phenomenon in an all-new way from the comfort of your home with the Avatar Legends: 20th Anniversary Physical RPG Bundle by Magpie Games. Choose an elemental bending specialty, create an original character, gather your friends, and embark on adventures alongside beloved heroes like Katara, Toph, and Zuko. Get Avatar Legends: The Roleplaying Game shipped to you with an official dice set, GM screen, journal pack, cloth map, and Pai Sho tiles. Act fast—this Humble exclusive won’t last long! Pay what you want and help support the ACLU with your purchase.

Limited Quantities Available!

Key expires. Please redeem before May 31st, 2026

item.title: 2K Tactics & Tycoons
item.description: Master the art of war…or just the art of city planning
item.content:encoded:
Master tacticians and tycoons, assemble! You’ll want to take advantage of this great bundle of war games and city strategy simulators fit for the business tycoon and/or valorous general inside you. Get your boots on the ground and send your battalions to the front lines with four games from the Army Men series! Manage the railways of past and present in Railroad Tycoon II Platinum and Railroad Tycoon 3! Take things way back in time with CivCity: Rome, or way into the future with the Homeworld Remastered Collection! There’s way more to explore in this bundle, so make the savvy business move of getting it while it’s hot, and support Covenant House with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 24th, 2027

item.title: Best of Humble: Fight 4 Your Friends
item.content:encoded:
There’s no horde you can’t stop together in this epic refresh of action-packed titles featuring some of the best co-op shooters out there! We’ve assembled a curated collection of our favorite zombie games with all-new content for you to enjoy. Face the once-human hosts of the Ridden in the acclaimed 4-player Back 4 Blood. Stand against the Skaven and Chaos swarms in Warhammer: Vermintide 2. Save humankind from undead Armageddon in Zombie Army 4: Dead War. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support Trees, Water, People!

Keys expire. Please redeem Back 4 Blood: Deluxe Edition and Warhammer: Vermintide 2: Collector's Edition before October 22nd, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before April 22nd, 2027.

item.title: Strategic Minds Collection
item.description: Plan your moves, pitch your battles, defeat your enemies
item.content:encoded:
Got an unquenchable desire to lead armies into battle against dark forces but nowhere to let loose? We’ve got just the bundle for you: A collection of strategy games of all genres and levels of difficulty, fit for seasoned generals and new recruits alike. Lead the forces of mankind against the machines in Terminator: Dark Fate - Defiance! Travel across the stars and explore new worlds with your brand-new faster-than-light fleet in Galactic Civilizations IV! There are even more games in this bundle to flex your strategy skills, so refresh your battle tactics and grab this bundle at the price of your choice—every purchase supports BuildOn!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 22nd, 2027

item.title: Sekai Project 2026
item.description: Play the hottest titles in adult gaming
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Find love, companionship, and a little something extra with a curated collection of hot and spicy sim games. This tantalizing bundle is guaranteed to excite even the shyest of gamers: A misunderstanding transforms into a compelling love story in My Girlfriend's Special Place. Fall for the hottest patisserie shop employees in Nekopara Vol. 3, or follow along as your favorite catgirls journey to France to master new baking techniques and find love in Nekopara Vol. 4. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support charity!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 17th, 2027

item.title: Humble 15 for $15 - Spring 2026
item.content:encoded:
If you’re a gamer looking for a great deal and just happen to have $15 burning a hole in your pocket, we have just the deal for you! Our newest collection offers 15 games for just $15—that’s $1 per game! Strap on your rodent-sized astronaut suit and defeat cheese-based enemies in Rocket Rats! Find hope and purpose after selling your soul for a swanky job in DISTRAINT 2! Become a master of necromancy and raise your skeleton army in sinister roguelite deckbuilder Necroking! All of these games and more—15 games, to be exact—can be had for the low, low price of $15, and every purchase supports Comic Relief! And stay tuned: We’re planning many more of these $15 steals for the future!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before April 15th, 2027.

item.title: Metro Mania: Planes, Trains, and Automobiles!
item.description: Jump into the driver’s seat of fun
item.content:encoded:
All aboard! The Metro Mania Bundle of ultra-exciting planes-, trains-, and automobile-themed games is arriving at the station! Hit the open road in a variety of awesome off-roaders in Expeditions: A MudRunner Game, or fix train connections and traverse the globe in Railbound. Pay what you want for a fast-pass to fun with a curated collection of red-hot transportation games and let the good times roll!

Keys expire. Please redeem all titles by April 10, 2027.

item.title: Humble Heroines: Echoes, Voids, and Visions
item.content:encoded:
Tired of the same old beefy boy protagonists with cool guy attitudes and hypermasculine storylines? These female-fronted games are the perfect antidote to the dude-ly doldrums, and are available all in one convenient bundle! Use your psychic powers to uncover a mystery at an abandoned resort in The Medium. Enjoy the vibrant graphics and terrifying monsters in the metaphysical survival horror game Sorry We’re Closed. Save a dwindling society with the help of a frying pan and your mysterious powers in Eastward. There are even more fun games led by powerful heroines to discover in this bundle, so grab it now for the price of your choice—every purchase contributes to the Girls Make Games Scholarship Fund!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before April 16, 2027.

item.title: Checkmate! A Chess Games Collection
item.content:encoded:
Think classic boardgames are played out? Think again! Explore new ways to play chess with the all-new Checkmate! Bundle. Flex your mental muscles in Pawnbarian, the quick-moving, turn-based puzzle roguelike that incorporates elements of chess to create a fresh experience. Or dive into an adventure rooted in the spirit of chess like Dark Chess, the story-driven campaign against evil kings and queens. Play these and the freshest chess titles around and simultaneously help support World Central Kitchen—now that’s a power move!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 8, 2027.

item.title: Metroidvania Mayhem Bundle
item.content:encoded:
There’s nothing better than a really great Metroidvania game, and this bundle full of side-scrolling fantasy and sci-fi action has some of the best! Help an amnesiac girl battle monsters in a strange land in Lost Ruins! Play as a rabbit with a giant robot fist and liberate your city from its robotic oppressors in F.I.S.T.: Forged in Shadow Torch! Join a ruthless bounty hunter to explore the steampunk world and twist-filled story of Gestalt: Steam & Cinder! Whether you’re a fan of that classic pixelated style or you’re just really in the mood for a juicy adventure game, this bundle has everything you need for the price of your choice—and every purchase supports CARE!

Keys expire. Please redeem Ultros Deluxe Edition before October 1st, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before April 1st, 2027.
